user_prompt: Assist with heavy bolter a purification
prayer:
Approach the heavy bolter with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the ancient Rite of Purification upon its sacred barrels and breach mechanisms.
Anoint the heavy bolter's feeding systems with sanctified oils to exorcise foul corruptions.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the heavy bolter to emerge purified and wrathful.
Cycle diagnostic litanies through its auspex relays, affirming the purification's sanctity.

user_prompt: The Land Speeder awaits a repair
prayer:
Kneel before the Land Speeder, intoning the Litany of Restoration to its hovering frame.
Diagnose fractures in the Land Speeder's gravitic impellers with binary prayers.
Repair the wounded alloys by welding with the sacred fire of the forge, invoking Omnissiah's grace.
Realign the thruster vanes whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's forgiveness for its scars.
Test the Land Speeder's renewed vigour through ritual thrust incantations.

user_prompt: The Valkyrie gunship requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
Converge upon the Valkyrie gunship in dire exigency, chanting emergency catechisms.
Execute the emergency procedure by severing tainted power conduits with blessed blades.
Purge volatile plasma cells within the Valkyrie gunship's reactors via ablative rites.
Reinvigorate the Machine Spirit of the Valkyrie gunship with galvanic invocations.
Validate stability through auspex sweeps and final Omnissian blessings.

user_prompt: My Baneblade is ready for operation
prayer:
Commence the preparatory rites for the Baneblade's operation, oiling its titanic treads.
Awaken the colossal Machine Spirit within the Baneblade through thunderous litanies.
Calibrate all armoured bastions for the operation, beseeching flawless execution.
Sanctify the Baneblade's volcano cannon with incense and invocation.
Proclaim readiness for operation under the Omnissiah's unblinking gaze.

user_prompt: Prepare the life sustainer for repair
prayer:
Approach the life sustainer with hushed vox-canticles of renewal.
Dissect its vital pumps for repair, murmuring apologies to the resident Machine Spirit.
Reconstruct the life sustainer's filtration membranes using sanctified polymers.
Reinfuse nutrient flows whilst invoking the Omnissiah's breath of life.
Test the repaired life sustainer through cyclical diagnostic purges.

user_prompt: Urgent air filtration an emergency procedure needed
prayer:
In urgent assembly, beseech the air filtration unit amid emergency procedure.
Isolate compromised scrubbers in the air filtration system with severing rites.
Execute the emergency procedure by ablating toxified matrices with plasma torches.
Reawaken the Machine Spirit of the air filtration through galvanic catechisms.
Verify atmospheric purity via sacred chem-sensors and concluding blessings.

user_prompt: Assist with optical mechadendrite a cooling
prayer:
Extend probe-servitors to the optical mechadendrite for cooling ministrations.
Invoke coolant litanies upon the optical mechadendrite's overheating oculi.
Cycle sacred cryofluids through its conduits to enact the cooling rite.
Pacify the Machine Spirit of the optical mechadendrite with soothing binaric hymns.
Affix thermal wards, ensuring vigilant sight under Omnissiah's light.

user_prompt: Ready the neutron laser for engagement
prayer:
Prepare the neutron laser for engagement with focusing arrays aligned in prayer.
Chant activation dogmata to rouse the neutron laser's annihilatory core.
Synchronise power feeds for engagement, anointing lenses with sacred unguents.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the neutron laser to unleash precise fury.
Test coherence through low-yield lases, hailing the Omnissiah's wrath.
